author: IGN RSS
text:
First Alien: Isolation 2 Footage Revealed at Summer Game Fest 2026
The first trailer for Alien: Isolation 2 has been show at SGF 2026, revealing a new planet and the return of the galaxy's deadliest predator.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Among Us Animated Series Shadow Drops on Paramount+
All 10 episodes of the Among Us animated series have dropped on Paramount+.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Final Fantasy VII Remake Part 3 Called Revelation, Out Simultaneously Across All Platforms
Square Enix has finally revealed Final Fantasy VII Remake part three, called Revelation. It’s due out simultaneously across PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X and S, and PC.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Control Resonant Hands-On Preview: No Guns, No Problem for This Melee-Action Sequel
Control Resonant is shaping up to be exactly what it looks like: more Control, only designed as a melee action game as opposed to physics-driven third person shooter. And so far, that’s an incredibly potent mix.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Medieval: Chronicles Looks to Offer Deep Strategic Gameplay Along With Gruesome Up-Close Action Combat | IGN Preview
The original Chronicles: Medieval announcement trailer featured the voice work of actor Tom Hardy narrating the dramatic trailer, but that isn’t all the star power that developer Raw Power is looking to bring to bear. Grand Admiral Thrawn himself, Lars Mikkelsen, will be adding his voice to the cast in some fashion.

author: IGN RSS
text: MMORPG AION 2 Announces September Global Release Date

author: IGN RSS
text:
Palworld is Finally Getting Its Full 1.0 Release, Coming in July
Palworld has been in early access for over two years and come July 10, 2026, it'll have its official Palworld 1.0 release.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Stellar Blade Bloodrain Revealed With Debut Trailer
Shift Up has announced Stellar Blade 2 alongside a debut trailer at Summer Game Fest 2026.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Maverick Game’s Open-World Racer Clutch Is Set on the French Riviera, Features Monaco
Location, cast, and story revealed for open-world action-driving game, Clutch.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Hot Wheels Infinite Rush Takes the Racing Game Series Open World
Hot Wheels Infinite Rush is the next game in the Hot Wheels racing series, and this time it’s going open world.

author: IGN RSS
text:
The Hoppers 4K Steelbook Is Back in Stock at Amazon Following Its Disney+ Streaming Debut
Outside of the film's box office success, demand for the 4K Blu-ray collector's edition has been seemingly off the charts

author: IGN RSS
text:
Gothic 1 Remake Review So Far
A remake that pulls this RPG classic into the modern era visually and doesn’t touch much else.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Mafia: The Old Country Is Getting a Story DLC Very Soon
Mafia: The Old Country is getting a surprise story expansion this August.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Assassin's Creed Co-Creator Re-Reveals 1666 Amsterdam, 30-Minute Demo Playable Now
Once-abandoned historical action adventure 1666 Amsterdam has been re-announced at Summer Game Fest by Assassin's Creed co-creator Patrice Désilets.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Guild Wars 3 Officially Revealed, Beta Starts Fall 2027 For ArenaNet's Next MMORPG
Guild Wars 3 was officially announced at Summer Game Fest along with a reveal trailer. It'll come to PC and PS5 and a beta is planned for Fally 2027.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Even the RuneScape Spinoff Is Coming Out in September
Add another game to the September pileup: RuneScape: Dragonwilds is due out on PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X and S on September 15, 2026.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Gundam Rogue Orbit Revealed With Action-Packed Trailer and 2027 Release Window
As revealed at Summer Game Fest 2026, Gundam Rogue Orbit is a new action game from Bandai Namco that’s set to let players pilot their own mechs in 2027.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Stranger Than Heaven Release Date Revealed; Tupac Confirmed as a Character
Stranger Than Heaven has a release date and Tupac is in the game... for some reason

author: IGN RSS
text:
Avatar: The Last Airbender AAA RPG Announced in 2024 Is Dead
The Avatar: The Last Airbender AAA RPG announced in 2024 is dead, IGN can confirm.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Amy Hennig's Marvel 1943: Rise of Hydra Won't Be Released Until 2027 at the Earliest
In November 2025, Marvel 1943: Rise of Hydra was delayed “beyond early 2026,” with no new release window offered. Some took it as a sign of significant development trouble at Skydance New Media, and perhaps a signal that the game might never come out. But one exec at the newly formed Paramount Games Studio has told IGN it’s a real game and will come out — just not this year.
